readings.title: Ken's Busy Week
readings.text: Ken is an easygoing student in the Food and Beverage Department. He is proud of his talent for cooking. After school, he loves to play Call of Duty and NBA games on his phone. Last month, someone tried to open his game account. Luckily, a strong password kept the account safe. Now Ken uses a longer password to secure it. His mother cannot explain why he loves games so much. To her, it is a mystery. Ken also has a plan. He wants to save one thousand dollars for a new phone, so he stopped buying junk food and drinks. This weekend, he will take a day off from games because he cannot put off his big cooking test. After the test, he will play again at full speed.

questions.explain: 英中配合（第 1–15 題）：save節省、safe安全的、secure確保、meter公尺、gram克、speed速度、fashion流行、proud驕傲的、explain解釋、sail航行、talent天份、bottom底部、mystery神秘、easygoing隨和的、junk垃圾

questions.stem: This bridge is very ___ to walk on.
questions.explain: 這座橋走起來很安全。very 後接形容詞 safe＝安全的。

questions.stem: The airport has very tight ___.
questions.explain: 機場有非常嚴密的安全措施。形容詞 tight 後接名詞 security＝安全措施。

questions.stem: The swimming pool is fifty ___ long.
questions.explain: 這個游泳池有五十公尺長。fifty 後用複數，長度用 meter（公尺）不用公里。

questions.stem: This watermelon weighs about three ___.
questions.explain: 這顆西瓜重約三公斤。西瓜很重，用 kilogram（公斤），three 後用複數。

questions.stem: This kind of hat is in ___ now.
questions.explain: 這種帽子現在很流行。in fashion＝流行中，介系詞 in 後接名詞 fashion。

questions.stem: My mom is ___ of my good grades.
questions.explain: 我媽媽以我的好成績為榮。be proud of＝以…為榮，用形容詞 proud。

questions.stem: The teacher gave a clear ___.
questions.explain: 老師給了清楚的說明。冠詞 a 與形容詞 clear 後接名詞 explanation＝解釋。

questions.stem: A ___ works hard on the big ship.
questions.explain: 一位水手在大船上努力工作。A 後接名詞 sailor＝水手。

questions.stem: She is a ___ young singer.
questions.explain: 她是一位有才華的年輕歌手。名詞前用形容詞 talented＝有才能的。

questions.stem: The old house looks very ___ at night.
questions.explain: 那間老房子晚上看起來很神秘。感官動詞 looks 後接形容詞 mysterious＝神秘的。

questions.stem: I want to ___ some money in the bank.
questions.explain: 我想在銀行存一些錢。save＝儲存；節省。

questions.stem: The car drives at a very high ___.
questions.explain: 那輛車以很高的速度行駛。at a high speed＝以高速；speed＝速度。

questions.stem: There is some sand at the ___ of the sea.
questions.explain: 海底有一些沙子。沙子會沉下去，在海的 bottom＝底部。

questions.stem: My uncle is kind and ___ to everyone.
questions.explain: 我叔叔待人親切又隨和。easygoing＝隨和的。

questions.stem: People call old and useless things ___.
questions.explain: 人們把老舊又沒用的東西叫作垃圾。junk＝垃圾。

questions.stem: The rain made them ___ the game until Sunday.
questions.explain: 大雨使他們把比賽延到星期日。put off＝延期（until Sunday 表示延後）。

questions.stem: It is hot, so please ___ your jacket.
questions.explain: 天氣很熱，所以請脫掉你的外套。hot 表示要脫，take off＝脫掉。

questions.stem: My dad will take a day ___ to rest at home.
questions.explain: 我爸爸會請一天假在家休息。take a day off＝休假一天，off 放在 a day 後面。

questions.stem: A: What time do you have? B: ___
options: It is a quarter to eight.
questions.explain: 問「現在幾點」，答時間：It is a quarter to eight（差一刻八點＝七點四十五分）。

questions.stem: A: What day comes after Monday? B: ___
questions.explain: 問「星期一後面是星期幾」，答星期：It is Tuesday（星期二）。

questions.stem: A: What is the date this Sunday? B: ___
questions.explain: 問「這個星期日幾號」，答日期：It is October twentieth（十月二十號）。

questions.stem: A: What is the weather like this morning? B: ___
questions.explain: 問「今天早上天氣如何」，答天氣：It is snowy（下雪）。
英中配合（第 1–15 題）：talent天份、junk垃圾、speed速度、proud驕傲的、safe安全的、mystery神秘、gram克、easygoing隨和的、sail航行、bottom底部、meter公尺、explain解釋、save節省、fashion流行、secure確保

questions.stem: The factory cares about the ___ of every worker.
questions.explain: 工廠重視每位工人的安全。the ... of 之間用名詞 safety＝安全。

questions.stem: This lock will keep your bike ___.
questions.explain: 這個鎖能讓你的腳踏車保持安全。keep + 受詞 + 形容詞 secure＝安全的。

questions.stem: Taipei is about two hundred ___ from Kaohsiung.
questions.explain: 台北離高雄大約兩百公里。城市間距離很長，用 kilometer（公里），並用複數。

questions.stem: This gold ring weighs only five ___.
questions.explain: 這只金戒指只重五克。戒指很輕，用 gram（克），並用複數。

questions.stem: Her new dress is very ___.
questions.explain: 她的新洋裝很時髦。be 動詞後接形容詞 fashionable＝流行的。

questions.stem: She said it with great ___.
questions.explain: 她很自豪地說出這句話。介系詞 with 後接名詞 pride＝驕傲；自豪。

questions.stem: Can you ___ this hard question to me?
questions.explain: 你能跟我解釋這道難題嗎？can 後接原形動詞 explain＝解釋。

questions.stem: They will ___ across the sea next week.
questions.explain: 他們下週會航行越過大海。will 後接原形動詞 sail＝航行。

questions.stem: He has a special ___ for drawing.
questions.explain: 他有畫畫的特殊天份。冠詞 a 與形容詞 special 後接名詞 talent＝天份。

questions.stem: No one can solve this strange ___.
questions.explain: 沒有人能解開這個奇怪的謎團。指示詞 this 與形容詞 strange 後接單數名詞 mystery。

questions.stem: We should ___ water to protect the earth.
questions.explain: 我們應該節約用水來保護地球。save＝節省。

questions.stem: The train runs at full ___.
questions.explain: 火車全速行駛。at full speed＝全速；speed＝速度。

questions.stem: My name is last, at the ___ of the list.
questions.explain: 我的名字排最後，在名單的底部。last（最後）對應 bottom＝底部。

questions.stem: She is so ___ that she never gets angry.
questions.explain: 她很隨和，從來不生氣。never gets angry＝easygoing＝隨和的。

questions.stem: We put all the ___ and trash in one bag.
questions.explain: 我們把所有垃圾雜物放進一個袋子。junk 和 trash 一起，junk＝垃圾。

questions.stem: Do not ___ today's work until tomorrow.
questions.explain: 不要把今天的工作拖到明天。put off＝延遲（until tomorrow 表示拖後）。

questions.stem: The plane will ___ in ten minutes.
questions.explain: 飛機十分鐘後會起飛。飛機用 take off＝起飛。

questions.stem: She wants to take two days ___ for the trip.
questions.explain: 她想請兩天假去旅行。take two days off＝休假兩天，off 放在 two days 後面。

questions.stem: A: What time is it by your watch? B: ___
questions.explain: 問「你的錶現在幾點」，答時間：It is ten thirty（十點半）。

questions.stem: A: What day comes before Friday? B: ___
questions.explain: 問「星期五前面是星期幾」，答星期：It is Thursday（星期四）。

questions.stem: A: What is the date next Monday? B: ___
questions.explain: 問「下星期一幾號」，答日期：It is November third（十一月三號）。

questions.stem: A: What is the weather like in the mountains? B: ___
questions.explain: 問「山上天氣如何」，答天氣：It is windy（起風；有風）。

questions.stem: Please drive ___ in the heavy rain.
questions.explain: 大雨中請安全地開車。動詞 drive 後用副詞 safely＝安全地。

questions.stem: Lock the door ___ before you leave.
questions.explain: 離開前把門鎖牢。動詞 lock 後用副詞 securely＝牢固地。

questions.stem: Taipei 101 is about five hundred ___ tall.
questions.explain: 台北 101 大約五百公尺高。高度用 meter（公尺），five hundred 後用複數。

questions.stem: This bag of rice weighs one ___.
questions.explain: 這袋米重一公斤。米很重用 kilogram（公斤），one 後用單數。

questions.stem: Nobody wears this ___ hat these days.
questions.explain: 現在沒有人戴這種過時的帽子了。nobody wears（沒人戴）→ old-fashioned＝過時的。

questions.stem: She smiled ___ at her big prize.
questions.explain: 她驕傲地對著她的大獎微笑。動詞 smiled 後用副詞 proudly＝驕傲地。

questions.stem: Our teacher always ___ the hard parts.
questions.explain: 我們老師總是解釋困難的部分。always＋第三人稱單數用 explains＝解釋。

questions.stem: The old man ___ his boat every weekend.
questions.explain: 那位老人每個週末都駕船出海。第三人稱單數現在式用 sails＝航行。

questions.stem: He is the most ___ player on the team.
questions.explain: 他是隊上最有才能的球員。most 與名詞 player 之間用形容詞 talented＝有才能的。

questions.stem: The dark forest feels very ___ at night.
questions.explain: 黑暗的森林在夜裡感覺很神秘。feel 後接形容詞 mysterious＝神秘的。

questions.stem: I ___ my pocket money for a new bike.
questions.explain: 我存零用錢要買一台新腳踏車。for a new bike 表示存錢，save＝儲存；節省。

questions.stem: The young runner has amazing ___.
questions.explain: 這位年輕跑者有驚人的速度。speed＝速度。

questions.stem: Turn the cup over and look at its ___.
questions.explain: 把杯子翻過來看它的底部。turn over（翻過來）→ bottom＝底部。

questions.stem: My new teacher is calm and ___.
questions.explain: 我的新老師冷靜又隨和。calm（冷靜）對應 easygoing＝隨和的。

questions.stem: Please clear the ___ out of your room.
questions.explain: 請把房間裡的垃圾雜物清出去。junk＝垃圾。

questions.stem: Let's not ___ the meeting again.
questions.explain: 我們別再延期這場會議了。put off＝延期。

questions.stem: Please ___ your wet shoes at the door.
questions.explain: 請在門口脫掉你的濕鞋子。take off＝脫掉。

questions.stem: I will take three days ___ next month.
questions.explain: 我下個月會請三天假。take three days off＝休假三天，off 放在 three days 後面。

questions.stem: A: What time does the movie start? B: ___
questions.explain: 問「電影幾點開始」，答時間：It is eight o'clock（八點）。

questions.stem: A: What day is your birthday party? B: ___
questions.explain: 問「你的生日派對是星期幾」，答星期：It is Saturday（星期六）。

questions.stem: A: What is the date on the ticket? B: ___
questions.explain: 問「票上的日期是幾號」，答日期：It is September first（九月一號）。

questions.stem: A: What is the weather like at the beach? B: ___
questions.explain: 問「海邊天氣如何」，答天氣：It is sunny（晴天）。

questions.stem: What is this reading mainly about?
options: Ken's school life and his plan
How to cook a big meal
The history of Call of Duty
How to buy a cheap phone
questions.explain: 全文在講 Ken 的學校生活、遊戲帳號和存錢計畫，主旨選 (A)。抓大意先看頭尾句。

questions.stem: Why did Ken stop buying junk food and drinks?
options: He does not like the taste.
He wants to save money for a new phone.
His mother told him to stop.
The school does not sell them.
questions.explain: 文中說 He wants to save one thousand dollars for a new phone, so he stopped buying junk food → (B) 為了存錢買新手機。

questions.stem: Which is true about Ken?
options: He is not good at cooking.
He will play games before the big test.
He uses a new password to keep his account safe.
He wants to buy a new computer.
questions.explain: 文中 Now Ken uses a longer password to secure it → (C) 他用新密碼保護帳號。(A) 他很會煮、(B) 考前他暫停遊戲、(D) 他要買的是手機。
